codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly configures and validates the GCP Cloud Storage integration. It enforces MIME validation using magic bytes, rejecting invalid types, and successfully enforces maximum file size configurable via MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB. The controller maps these cases to HTTP 400 via standard BadRequestExceptions. The unit and E2E tests have been expanded to thoroughly test these conditions.

summary: Storage MIME type and size limit validation successfully implemented with full test coverage.
